subject: discussion regarding current compensation

dear [boss name],

i am writing to formally discuss my position within the company and request a review of my current salary. over the past year, i have successfully managed several key projects and exceeded sales targets by twenty percent. additionally, i have taken on extra responsibilities that align with my growth and development goals. based on these achievements and market standards, i believe a salary increase is warranted at this time. i would appreciate the opportunity to speak with you about this matter during our next meeting. please let me know your availability.

thank you for your time and consideration.

best regards,

[my name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
subject: discussion regarding current compensation

dear [boss name],

i am writing to formally discuss my position within the company and request a review of my current salary. over the past year, i have successfully managed several key projects and exceeded sales targets by twenty percent. additionally, i have taken on extra responsibilities that align with my growth and development goals. based on these achievements and market standards, i believe a salary increase is warranted at this time. i would appreciate the opportunity to speak with you about this matter during our next meeting. please let me know your availability.

thank you for your time and consideration.

best regards,

[my name]<|im_end|>
